mapper.select:
SELECT id, book_id, member_id, loaned_at, due_date, returned_at FROM loans
ORDER BY loaned_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT id, book_id, member_id, loaned_at, due_date, returned_at FROM loans WHERE returned_at IS NULL AND due_date < CURRENT_DATE ORDER BY due_date, id LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM loans WHERE returned_at IS NULL AND due_date < CURRENT_DATE
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM loans WHERE book_id = #{bookId} AND returned_at IS NULL
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM books WHERE id = #{bookId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM members WHERE id = #{memberId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO loans (book_id, member_id, due_date) VALUES (#{bookId}, #{memberId}, CURRENT_DATE + 14)
mapper.update: UPDATE loans SET returned_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND returned_at IS NULL
